h1c076b6ega4b0g42eegb9b8gfc6432ee58f1: I have to ask - how do you know so much about the parasite?
hb5e28b9eg2af0g44deg8266g9d4316bd772e: I studied one up close - closer than most would care to be to those things.
haab6ad37g0432g4ef4g95ccgaf13ec98406b: A drow attacked me and I defended myself. Afterwards, I was able to examine the tadpole that emerged.
h1a9f7c52g115cg4196g8757gb1be341fd5ff: Hideous - but fascinating. Like nothing else in nature, I'm glad to say.
ha8d345dbg6a8eg4c72gbf20geff449dc0045: You've been researching the illithid parasites - is there anything you can tell me?
h824e64fag2b4bg41d5g8c1cg9d1dfe7d80b8: I've inspected a tadpole up close and seen the effects of them on the Absolute's so-called 'True Souls.'
h4c292126gf6ffg4126g9ba7g0369a39e5c63: Powerful, certainly. But clearly arrested by magic, too. The question I just can't answer is who has done this. And why?
ha6926e9cg399cg468bg9159g9b0ab638b731: There'll be no firm answers until Moonrise Towers, I fear.
h5ade4c38gfffeg4fffg97efg775c70e9373d: What will happen to the grove now?
h7d243a3cgdcdfg435bg874agd65d1a25928e: It is lost to me - lost to the world. Perhaps there'll be some way to unseal it in the future...
hc435b61fg0229g4a88g9e75g6453a494e880: ... perhaps not. I do not know. All I can do for now is to try do some good where I can - try to help you.
hcec467d2g1ae1g46ddga502g8b3ca8f44763: What about the grove? Will the it be safe without you?
hd90c8ef4ga9eeg4405g8e2fg9d5d6a7f8c5d: Hopefully. I've chosen a successor as First Druid - Francesca of the High Forest. I sent a bird to summon her.
h43305f42g5d72g4582gbd8ag38dbeb5b5e3d: First and only Druid. What will Francesca even do here?
h9429b993g6110g4b08g8328gc624baf3ce82: She can tend to the grove, help it heal. In time, others will join. Perhaps some day I can return.
h6857220eg2bc3g4b98gad1bg4cb90ee837ec: A fellow druid. I can count on her to tend to the grove in my absence, help it heal.
h81ab28a1g6154g44e7g84e6g961562ac9ffc: Precisely! Who indeed? You do not know, and neither do any of the others.
hb9c35f6eg30e5g4b42g8e24gd55e2abc2044: The grove needs to move beyond the mistakes of the past. What it needs is an unknown quantity; an outsider who can enforce the Oak Father's teachings without bias.
h4e9eb604gfbacg4356gb39ag15979616c9f6: This is why I chose Francesca. She will restore simplicity and purity to the grove in my absence.
h59e8142fgd8f6g4321g9472gc36eab76d322: Contrary to how some think of us, we druids can play politics when necessary.
hd79f8aa0g86f5g40c1g9dd7g32d93ce3c94d: Resentment will spring up like mushrooms no matter what I do. You cannot please everyone and you'd be a fool to try.
h9b8d11d6g2071g4ed8g9b68g1efe9cc5973a: Sounds like the grove will be in good hands then.
h03b6229ag3a8eg409fgac6fg0f2a2555be82: There's nobody in the grove you'd chose?
h0e4e5ae4g43e3g498dg9c95g97d9a5b9a5a2: No. At least, not right now.
h071d8c05g034eg475fg871egd195b09534fe: What about one of the others? Rath perhaps?
h3ffedd89gdd6fg469ag8e33ge01917ee3482: Rath has promise, but he's not ready yet. The grove needs experience and a strong hand.
hcbbff37eg53c3g488ag928eg5abd2807a85c: I need her to stay focused on her training - the grove will need a skilled healer in my absence.
had2cf7ecg1b87g400fg817dg474ba12b0661: This shadow curse you spoke of... surely it can't be that bad.
h2a881a40g0d95g4a41ga746g67c0ed0b5036: It's had the whole region around Moonrise Towers in a chokehold of darkness and despair for years now.
h28ffa130g5769g4f9aga94dg2b6f80ef3e9b: Those who remained are shadow-cursed. If you don't die at their hands, then you become one of them.
hae2c688cgd711g49eeg9813g0dc745f955a5: We have to get to Moonrise, but the less time we spend in its blighted surrounds, the better.
hba33ddabgbac3g42c0gbd62g362157500d20: What about this secret stronghold in the Underdark? You must know more.
he40cbbebgccf2g412eg9b4dg09c12837b18b: Precious little, but I'm quite certain it can still be found.
h9f794503ge531g4e96g9d0egd897db7abbfc: Aradin was convinced there was a hidden entrance in the Temple of Selûne; I'd start there.
h75903ee3gb520g4544gab2fg13df5436c59f: One of his cohorts, a dwarf called Brian, had a clue on his person. If you find his corpse in the goblins' camp, you may have a start.
h85e49389g8d7eg4314gaf50g6e99562016bc: Why do you want to go to Moonrise Towers?
hc95a5459g3a55g4010gbd25gd7823fcc7ede: Those illithid creatures threaten the natural order - it's my duty to do what I can to stop them.
hb44950feg23d8g46f1gb29fg17f32545f181: There's also the shadow curse - it's an affront and must be cleansed.
h44a4ab71geae1g4a12g99fagfc850d902a64: I helped overthrow Ketheric Thorm and his Dark Justiciars, years ago. But I failed to prevent him from unleashing darkness across the region before he was defeated.
h6813d8dag2da8g45b6g83ffgc71b1a8ce568: If I can join you and get close to Moonrise, perhaps I can lift this curse just as you find a cure for your infection.
hea42eeeeg4174g4bd3gb581g6a905cdc96d1: Seems like you feel responsible for this shadow curse somehow...
hee5e64b0g2d62g4ac6gb19fg295f8b788346: Well... there's hardly anyone left to share the responsibility with. Few who witnessed the fall of Moonrise still draw breath.
h9ae5a905gf9c6g4d7bg8b81gd93c4519d993: What Ketheric Thorm unleashed is not something that nature can undo by itself. I must do what I can.
h42a883a0g9a93g44e2gb4bbg8f7107ea2041: I studied the shadow curse for years. But to truly understand it - and stop it - I must reach its source.
h60be367agf7c0g48fagb3e8g7ff71d5d14fe: Is that why you went with Aradin? You thought he might find this route to Moonrise?
h3219a9dcg4e17g4033ga41cg572aab7839bd: Precisely. Then perhaps I could have done something about both the shadow curse and ceremorphosis aberrations.
h01cb00deg76d8g4afbgbbc4gb96858291836: But in my eagerness, I put far too much faith in the abilities of Aradin and his band. We didn't even get close.
h96e01fa7g4cb8g41a3gbdf3gdab1615c50dc: One of those who died had a clue that was supposed to help us find the hidden entrance to the Underdark.
h1a89bebeg3813g46a9ga389g4f871390d836: A dwarf called Brian, I believe. Though there's no guarantee that the goblins left him recognisable.
hd04c2609g98b6g4ca4gb16egbc4e3d24e2b6: It can't have been easy, surrendering your title. Won't you miss being First Druid?
hfa5509a1g39f0g46d2gac19g6cd1bd132e41: Miss it? Oh dear no. It's a terrible burden; takes you away from nature and forces you to deal with others' problems and personalities.
h75e914f3ge6ecg4d64ga5d3gf5fcce74d0c5: Be wary of anyone who actually wants such a role, I say. Likely they don't understand it, or they have ill intent.
h274556e5g199cg410cgb100g4c2eef8fbfa7: I'm just glad to be out here amidst the Oak Father's creations.
h642c7a91g7179g4a0bgb458g6d93b5da358b: How're you faring out here at the camp?
h44ff7e05gc7a2g4d42gab82gc524e725e7b7: Wonderfully! If I'm honest, the grove was too comfortable for my tastes; I felt removed from nature.
he3a5f16cg900eg4981g88a0gcb83609f960d: I'll miss my books, but I can find all the wisdom they contain out here, first-hand.
